How about NOT pumping out a new "Copy of Duty" every year and instead focus in the core elements and anti-cheat?
Bring back dedicated servers: so that people can rent their own server and decide which players they want or dont want in their lobby. Lobbies stay together as long as players are connected to the server.
Bring back the og movement from cod 1&2. Leaning left or right was an important part of 1&2 - yes, slide may stay, but the current situation is just bs: automatic leaning sometimes works and other times it doesnt. Wall jump is sort of nice, but I barely use it.
Separate Single- and Multiplayer: I'm sure there are many players who feel like me: singleplayer is just a gimmick. Its not entertaining, its exaggerated with dogshite story writing and basically a waste of time.
Selling SP and MP separate would be a first step towards the community and could indicate the devs/publishers, where to put their focus on.

Honestly, Warzone 2020 is a work of art, all that was left to do was put FOV 120 on Consoles and launch new maps. The texture, the details, the lighting, the character's movement speed, crouching, aiming, shooting, running, jumping, everything was perfect.
Of course, additions are welcome, but they completely changed the game's proposal, which ruined the fun, as what we see now are people standing still or walking with their eyes open.
COD was always Arcade and they abruptly changed to “Realistic”, without need.
Most severe defects WZ 2: Bloom Effect; extreme visual recoil; effects when taking damage that make it impossible to see the enemy with this pixelated texture; Everything you will use has a delay and no cancel reload.
The community wants that 2020 quality, optimized and fun.

3. Make the deaths impactful. The way Makarov killed Soap was so bland.

@CallofDuty Hello Call of Duty,

Being a big fan of the franchise since my childhood and playing your games for over 15 years, I wanted to talk to you about the Beta and I must say that it is promising your responsiveness on patches and improvements are a relief for the community, but still, there are small things to improve:

- Improve weapon reload movements by at least 30%.

- Reduce allied footsteps

- Increase weapon aiming speed by at least 15%.

- Increase climbing speed by at least 20%.

- Add Bunny Hopping

- Continued play in the same Lobbies

- And above all, remove the SBMM and keep it for Ranked.

As I know you're capable of doing this and that you're listening to the community, and as you proved to us with the second weekend, if you add, it's an improvement, the game will be even better for it - thank you for listening to your players.
